problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
